'''Vetria Scoth''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of a horn-faced species, who hailed from [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. He worked as a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], and donned a suit of armor, which contained several items of equipment. He was armed with a [[Vetria Scoth's blaster rifle|blaster rifle]].<ref name="daa" />

==Behind the scenes==
The character of Vetria Scoth was created by [[Joe Lee]], though the "[[Design An Alien]]" competition held by [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine|''Star Wars Galaxy'']] magazine. The competition, which was launched in [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 3|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 3]] ([[1995]]), called for readers to create and design totally new alien species' influenced and inspired by the [[original trilogy]] of ''[[Star Wars]]'' films. Lee, a 26-year-old fan, submitted his drawing of Scoth, which was not included in the winners published in [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 7|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 7]] ([[1996]]), but was instead published as an "honorable mention" in [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 9|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 9]]. [[Holocron continuity database]] keeper [[Leland Chee]] has since stated that successfully published "Design an Alien" materials are considered [[canon]].<ref name="tt">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=690#14724917|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Leland Y Chee]]|date=2006-05-03|time=5:45 PM|quote=Star Wars Galaxy Magazine #7 published the winners of the 'Design an Alien' contest, where fans were encouraged to submit artwork and backstories of new SW aliens. Are these aliens canon? [...] Yes, though any text discrepencies with other sources would likely to superceded by the other source.}}</ref> In spite of this, Vetria Scoth has not been referenced in any other ''Star Wars'' material.
